name: SendPasswordResetEmailRequest
description: Implementation of the 'SendPasswordResetEmailRequest' model. Request to send a password reset email to a user

UserEmail.description: The user’s email address. The software uses this parameter as the username.

UserFirstName.description: The user’s first name. The software uses this parameter to verify the user.

UserLastName.description: The user’s last name. The software uses this parameter to verify the user.
